hooks.command: bash -lc 'payload=$(cat); command=$(printf "%s" "$payload" | jq -r '\''(.toolInput.command // .tool_input.command // .command // (try (.toolArgs | fromjson | .command) catch empty) // (try (.tool_args | fromjson | .command) catch empty) // .toolArgs.command // .tool_args.command // empty)'\''); if printf "%s\n" "$command" | grep -Eq '\''(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+([^;&|[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+)*(add|commit|reset|rm|mv|update-index|checkout-index|read-tree)([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+([^;&|[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+)*restore([^;&|]*[[:space:]])--staged([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+([^;&|[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+)*apply([^;&|]*[[:space:]])--(cached|index)([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+([^;&|[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+)*stash([^;&|]*[[:space:]])--staged([[:space:]]|$)'\''; then echo "Blocked: Codex may not change Git staged state or create commits." >&2; exit 2; fi'
